welcome.headline: Tu estudio de creación musical completo
welcome.subheadline: Crea, colabora y distribuye tu música con herramientas de IA y una suite de instrumentos profesionales, todo en la nube.

_notes.legal_note: [PLACEHOLDER] {terms_link} and {privacy_link} are inline hyperlinks. Order preserved.
_notes.cta_primary: 22 characters — fits ≤22 button budget. Must match steps.finish_button and confirmation.cta_primary exactly.
_notes.subheadline: IA positioned as a tool ('herramientas de IA'), not as the creator, per market voice rules.

_notes.finish_button: Must match welcome.cta_primary exactly — single source of truth.

signup.page_subtitle: Únete a {user_count} músicos y productores en ECHOCRAFT.
signup.field_password_hint: Usa una combinación de letras, números y símbolos.

_notes.page_subtitle: [PLACEHOLDER] {user_count} is a formatted integer. 'músicos y productores' is gender-inclusive phrasing.
_notes.signin_prompt: [PLACEHOLDER] {signin_link} is an inline hyperlink. Opening ¿ added for natural ES punctuation.

signin.page_subtitle: Inicia sesión para continuar en tu estudio.

_notes.page_title: [GENDER HOOK] 'Bienvenido de nuevo' uses masculine default. [REVIEW] If platform captures gender preference, consider serving 'Bienvenida de nuevo' for feminine-identified users.
_notes.signup_prompt: [PLACEHOLDER] {signup_link} is an inline hyperlink. ECHOCRAFT preserved uppercase.
_notes.submit_button: Matches dashboard.nav.sign_in value 'Iniciar sesión' for consistency.

profile_setup.page_subtitle: Cuéntanos sobre ti para personalizar tu experiencia.

_notes.page_subtitle: Simplified vs source for naturalness. No significant expansion risk.
_notes.field_role_label: Trailing ellipsis (…) preserved as intentional punctuation.
_notes.field_role_option_producer: [GENDER HOOK] Masculine default 'Productor'. [REVIEW] Consider 'Productor/a' if platform applies an inclusive language policy.
_notes.field_role_option_mixing_engineer: [GENDER HOOK] Masculine default 'Ingeniero de mezclas'. [REVIEW] Consider 'Ingeniero/a de mezclas'.
_notes.field_role_option_sound_designer: [REVIEW] Anglicism 'Sound designer' retained per source note. Not found as standalone term in ontology — confirm approved es-ES form.

plan_selection.page_subtitle: Desde artistas en solitario hasta equipos de producción, tenemos el plan que se adapta a tu creatividad.
plan_selection.audience_tab_creator_description: Para músicos y productores en solitario
plan_selection.billing_free_trial_note: Empieza tu prueba gratis, sin necesidad de tarjeta.

_notes.audience_tab_creator: Product line name — not translated per ontology policy (do_not_translate, prod_00000001).
_notes.audience_tab_studio: Product line name — not translated per ontology policy (do_not_translate, prod_00000002).
_notes.tier_label_starter: Brand tier name — not translated per ontology and CLAUDE.md rules.
_notes.tier_badge_popular: 'Más popular' — 11 characters, well within ≤22 button budget.
_notes.pricing_per_month: Displayed inline after price. Currency formatting handled by billing system.

_notes.creator_starter_name: Plan name — not translated. 'Starter', 'Pro', 'Max' are brand tier identifiers (do_not_translate).
_notes.creator_pro_tagline: Shortened from 'Flujo de trabajo completo para composición' (42 chars) to 'Flujo completo de composición' (29 chars) to respect ~30% expansion budget for taglines.
_notes.creator_starter_tagline: 'pistas' used per market terminology rule (track = pista).

plan_features.feature_includes_starter: Todo lo incluido en Creator Starter
plan_features.feature_includes_studio_starter: Todo lo incluido en Creator Starter
plan_features.feature_includes_studio_pro: Todo lo de Studio Starter, más:
plan_features.feature_includes_creator_pro: Todo lo incluido en Creator Pro
plan_features.feature_includes_creator_max: Todo lo incluido en Creator Max
plan_features.feature_includes_studio_pro_all: Todo lo de Studio Pro, más:

_notes.piano_roll: Ontology term: 'piano roll' (feat_00000006, status: pending). Anglicism retained as DAW-standard in ES-ES.
_notes.pattern_sequencer: Ontology term: 'secuenciador de patrones' (feat_00000002, status: pending).
_notes.arrangement_timeline: Ontology term: 'línea de tiempo de arreglo' (feat_00000007, status: pending).
_notes.multitrack_recording_8: Ontology term: 'grabación multipista' (feat_00000004, status: pending). Track count appended in parentheses.
_notes.audio_comping: [REVIEW] Not found in ontology. Anglicism 'Audio Comping' retained as it is standard DAW terminology in ES-ES production communities.
_notes.punch_in_recording: [REVIEW] Not found in ontology. 'Grabación Punch-In' retains the anglicism 'Punch-In' as standard DAW usage.
_notes.sample_library_20gb: Ontology term: 'biblioteca de samples' (feat_00000008, status: pending).
_notes.effects_rack: Ontology term: 'rack de efectos' (feat_00000009, status: pending).
_notes.mastering_chain: Ontology term: 'cadena de masterización' (feat_00000011, status: pending). 'masterización' used for docs/body context per market terminology rules.
_notes.loudness_analyzer: Ontology term: 'analizador de loudness' (feat_00000019, status: pending). 'loudness' kept as anglicism per ontology.
_notes.melody_generator: Ontology term: 'generador de melodías' (feat_00000010, status: pending).
_notes.chord_progression_generator: Ontology term: 'generador de progresiones de acordes' (feat_00000013, status: pending).
_notes.drum_pattern_generator: [REVIEW] Not found in ontology. 'Generador de patrones de batería' is natural ES translation.
_notes.style_transfer: Ontology term: 'transferencia de estilo' (feat_00000012, status: pending).
_notes.one_click_distribution: Ontology term: 'distribución con un clic' (feat_00000020, status: pending).
_notes.track_metadata_editor: Ontology term: 'editor de metadatos de pista' (feat_00000021, status: pending).
_notes.shared_projects: Based on ontology term: 'proyecto compartido' (feat_00000015, status: pending). Pluralised for list context.
_notes.real_time_jam_sessions: Ontology term: 'jam session' (feat_00000018, status: pending). 'en tiempo real' added to complete the phrase.
_notes.version_history: Ontology term: 'historial de versiones' (feat_00000017, status: pending, availability: planned for es-ES).
_notes.comments_markers: Based on ontology term: 'comentario y marcador' (feat_00000016, status: pending, availability: not_available for es-ES). Pluralised for list context.
_notes.interactive_lessons: [REVIEW] Not found in ontology. 'Lecciones interactivas' is natural ES translation.
_notes.chord_explorer: [REVIEW] Not found in ontology. 'Explorador de acordes' is natural ES translation.
_notes.scale_assistant: [REVIEW] Not found in ontology. 'Asistente de escalas' is natural ES translation.

confirmation.page_subtitle: Tu estudio está preparado. Vamos a crear algo.

_notes.page_title: [PLACEHOLDER] {name} is user display name. 'Todo listo' is a gender-neutral fixed expression — intentionally avoids gender inflection.
_notes.checklist_plan: [PLACEHOLDER] {plan_name} inserts a localised plan name (e.g. 'Creator Pro').
_notes.cta_primary: Must match welcome.cta_primary and steps.finish_button exactly — single source of truth.
